Locket of Escape  
 

Lore Item
Slot: NECK
Charges: 1
Effect: Bind Affinity (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 2.0) at Level 10
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Locket of Escape
Lore Item
Slot: NECK
Charges: 1
Effect: Bind Affinity (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 2.0) at Level 10
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Jewelry
Stackable:No

Tribute:102

Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 05:41:50
Page Updated:Sat Nov 8th, 2014

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 3,000,000pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: No Longer Dropped
Level to Attain: 35
[Adventure Merchants | Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Where is Marcia Attamilgad?

Adventure Merchants

Nobles

Can it be used more then once? Example of the one charge item: https://everquest.allakhazam.com/db/item.html?item=2384 Vibrating Hammer of Infuse

Hoarder Stickietoes Budderfingers Debt Collector of the Freeport Militia - 105 Froglok Paladin, Luclin

▲ Page top
about this item
QuoteReply
# Apr 03 2006 at 4:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592261434128
11 posts
this item definittly doesn t dropp anymore . It used to worth a LOT of pp when , back in the days , the only entrance to PoM was by ToV ... cause u could bind urself in PoM , but u could not be bounded there by someone else ...so casters where happy but melles were not , cause nobody could bind them there and the only way for them to get bounded here used to use a locket of escape.
for pple who still wonder why there were pple whishing to be bounded there , the reason is PoM was a place where only hight level well skilled pple were runing around , simply because it was HARDCORE to enter and only the best of the best guilds could make there way there.It was kinda the elite of everquest hanging around in PoM , quests there were awesome , exp too and once u were there u didn t need to get out really , except being ported by someone else for a raid, but u could always find a way to gate back once bounded there.
now the item is very rare and it costs a lot only because it doesn t dropp anymore ...
still a "must have " for a collection
▲ Page top
about this item

RE: still drop
QuoteReply
# Aug 10 2004 at 5:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781896178
View User Forum
10 posts
Unfortunately this item no longer drops.

The reason this item used to be so expensive is Plane of Mischief, IMO. Non-casting classes couldnt be bound there by binding classes and since this was a hard place to get to in the Velious Era, people would gladly pay the plat to get bound there.

▲ Page top
RE: ???
QuoteReply
# Jan 06 2004 at 5:49 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760353488
9 posts
This item can only be worn in the neck slot. It is not a proc, but a right click effect with a two second cast time. Also, it must be worn to use the effect.

▲ Page top
RE: where?
QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2003 at 6:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1636331011095
View User Forum
Scholar
21 posts
The reason the locket is so "cool" is this;

Ant character class that does not get the spell "Bind Affinity" can only be bound in cities and a few ket locations (the docks in ice clad for instance). That includes "outdoor types", and all 'melee' classes.

The key here is there is now in game several methods including shaman made gate potions to "gate" yourself to your bind point.

i.e. Binding with a locket allows you to use the new gate methods to gate to a set location at will.

No more is the tank left to fight his way out of a bad raid. No more does a tank have to worry about how to get back to his fav. hunting spot.

Is it worth 100k? Prolly not. Not much in this game is worth that unless you really in the top 1% of the characters on a server and have pp to burn.

Is it a good item though, absolutely.
▲ Page top
Vendor sells it back for 22k
QuoteReply
# Sep 04 2002 at 4:05 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966088910

6 posts
the price used to be much lower but it was nerfed and it now sells it back for 22k with the recharge trick.
So basically each Bind costs 44k

QuoteReply
# Sep 02 2002 at 9:31 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593965949877
View User Forum
27 posts
Ok....I play two characters that can bind themselves, and one melee that can not. Yes, it is nice to be able to bind yourself almost anywhere. But of all the uber equipment available for melee.....I can sure think of something better to spend 140k on than this piece of crap. They could make it unlimited charges and it would never be worth more than 10k'ish to any melee I ever play....and then I would think twice about it.
▲ Page top
Vendor Recharge?
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2002 at 11:52 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250653639
33 posts
Are you still able to recharge these by selling
them to a vendor and buying them back?
▲ Page top
RE: Vendor Recharge?
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2002 at 11:57 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250653639
33 posts
Found the old message that told how to recharge
item. Anyone have a clue how much a vendor
would sell this item for???

"This is how u recharge items first you need 2 or more items 1 without the charges 1 with charges. first sell the item WITH the charges to a vendor (make sure the vendor doesnt have alot of player sold crap on them) then sell the item WITHOUT the charges to the vendor if u have more than 1 item without charges then u can sell them too. Then buy them back. All will have charges. I have confirmed this with 2 chipped bone wands (3 charges of locate corpse) I used the charges on one sold the two to a vendor (one with charges first) then the one without. Bought them back and both had charges. This method works well with the Holgresh mojo sticks, Ivander's Hoop, or whatever.

Go ahead and flame me. Show the world how stupid you are.

Brambleton the wolfefied druid."
▲ Page top
RE: Vendor Recharge?
QuoteReply
# Aug 21 2002 at 8:28 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592758800476
7 posts
How do you have two of them to sell though when they are lore?

Thracken
[10 Necro]
The Nameless
▲ Page top
RE: Vendor Recharge?
QuoteReply
# Nov 19 2002 at 5:30 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592252108299
Scholar
73 posts
2 players coordinate the selling and buying back. 1 sells the fully charged, the other sells the empty one and then both people buy back their items. NPC's aren't limited to the lore restriction.
▲ Page top

Rechargable, and they are worthe well over 100k on fennin ro, my guildmate is paying 200k for one... i cant beleive you guys wasted it by binding outsie of KC and OS....my character is camped in Plane of Mischief(probably the best zone in the game) i would bind there

RE: Locket
QuoteReply
# Nov 11 2001 at 6:38 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1615767548027
47 posts
Why the hell would you pay for this? Sure thats great you can bind yourself almost anywhere with it as a melee. BFD
The most convenient place for melees to bind is in a city so they have access to merchants and banks. Sure being bound at PoM would be great (except I'm sure ya can't anyway, as you can't bind in ToV, and I really doubt you can bind in POM itself either), but the freaking novelty would wear off after about five minutes.
Total gimpness to pay large sums of pp for this, or trade a fungi tunic or whatever. Gotta be one of the more idiotic things I've read.

# May 15 2001 at 6:24 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Why?!? they also took out the ring with one charge of Gate. WTF is verant smoking? They were rare drops that were hard to get that allowed you to bind anyone anywhere and gate back ONCE if and ONLY if you did both camps required to get them both... They would be awesome in raids... the ability to bind your tanks just out side the zone so if they die they don't have to run all the way back. Verant has to be smoking something, or they just want to make the game a little harder, leaving these in would NOT have unbalanced the game.
